/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/client_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/client.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/aes_crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/union_find.cpp.o CMakeFiles/fed_client.dir/src/fed/data_preprocessor.cpp.o -o fed_client  -lpthread libfed_cuda.a /root/miniconda3/envs/fed_env/lib64/libcudart_static.a -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/librt.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so.3 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so.3
